branch_metadata.branch_rationale: Electroweak / vacuum-anchor QFT observable; vacuum-projection side

description: CKM-matrix closure: full |V_CKM| matrix derived from the bi-unitary spectral Yukawa eigenvalue construction; the Jarlskog invariant J_CP closes PRECISE 1.8% against PDG. The Wilson-holonomy three-extractor construction (Wilson / Berry / largest-eigenmode extractors, mutually disjoint) singles out a unique coherence-filtered regime and gives delta_CP EXACT 1.23% against NuFIT 6.1.

ckm_matrix_closure.claim: Full |V_CKM| matrix derived from the bi-unitary SYE construction
ckm_matrix_closure.method: spectral Yukawa eigenvalue extraction with biunitary diagonalization SYE-Y5; CKM = V_u^dag V_d

jarlskog_invariant_closure.claim: J_CP EXACT 0.73% via Wolfenstein-Compound from existing closures (Dossier MD-57)
jarlskog_invariant_closure.method: Wolfenstein-Compound J_CP = A^2 lambda^6 eta with lambda = V_us^closure = gamma sqrt(5), A = V_cb^closure / lambda^2 = eps_sync^2 sqrt(2/N_gen) / (5 gamma^2), eta = sin(delta_CP^F02b) * R_b with delta_CP^F02b = 1.130 rad (Wilson-holonomy subdominant phi_2 EXACT 1.23%) and R_b^PDG = 0.404

alternative_method_SYE_pipeline.method: Bi-unitary SYE in the extended regime (alternative independent producer pipeline)
alternative_method_SYE_pipeline.framing: The SYE-pipeline producer-method is reported as an independent direction-pass; the Wolfenstein-Compound is the closure-domain verdict per Konsolidiertes Dossier MD-57.

ckm_magnitudes_closure.claim: V_us / V_cb / V_ub all closure-domain-derived from Loop classes

antusch_2025_cross_check.anchor_source: Antusch, Hinze, Saad 2025 (arXiv:2510.01312) using UTfit 2023 (arXiv:2212.03894); sin theta_23 RG- and threshold-stable to GUT scale
antusch_2025_cross_check.framing: Framework V_cb is within 1-sigma of PDG 2024 inclusive (0.0410 +/- 0.0014) but in 2.7-sigma tension with the tighter exclusive UTfit-2023 anchor used by Antusch et al. 2025; this is the well-known V_cb^excl / V_cb^incl tension in the literature, NOT a structural failure of the loop-class closure

R_b_apex_distance.structural_identity: R_b = d * gamma * (1 + eps_sync^2) under Theorem 16d.10.7 d-multiplier extension (MD-60)
R_b_apex_distance.lemma: Theorem 16d.10.7 d-multiplier extension; (n=1, g=0, s=eps_sync^2) classification of V_ub

delta_CP_F02b_closure.claim: delta_CP EXACT 1.23% via F-02b three-extractor Wilson holonomy
delta_CP_F02b_closure.anchor_source: NuFIT 6.0 compact best-fit (Esteban, Gonzalez-Garcia, Maltoni, Martinez-Soler, Pinheiro, Schwetz; JHEP 12 (2024) 216, arXiv:2410.05380): delta_CP best-fit ~1.144 rad (normal ordering); NuFIT 6.1 (Nov 2025, http://www.nu-fit.org) is the most recent dataset update
delta_CP_F02b_closure.method: Wilson-holonomy W = U_u U_d U_u^dag U_d^dag with three disjoint extractors (Wilson, Berry, largest-eigenmode); the coherence filter |delta^Berry - delta^largest| < 0.05 rad singles out the unique coherence-filtered lattice regime; SU(3)-holonomy closure det W = 1 makes phi_1 redundant, so phi_2 is the independent CP readout

summary.framing: Full CKM matrix derived (1 DERIVED). Five quantitative closures all EXACT: V_us = gamma sqrt(5) at 0.10%; V_cb = eps_sync^2 sqrt(2/N_gen) at 0.43%; R_b = d gamma (1+eps_sync^2) at 0.51% (under Theorem 16d.10.7 d-multiplier extension); J_CP via Wolfenstein-Compound at 0.73% (Dossier MD-57); delta_CP via Wilson-holonomy three-extractor at 1.23%. The SYE-pipeline alternative for J_CP (FACTOR2 26%) is reported as an independent producer-method but superseded as the closure-domain verdict by the Wolfenstein-Compound construction.
